title: Senior Investment Banker at Union Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Union Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
